title: centaurea rhapontica subsp. heleniifolia
intro: Centaurea rhapontica subsp. heleniifolia, also known as the scabious flower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its vibrant blue and purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and psoriasis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea rhapontica subsp. heleniifolia include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its therapeutic properties.
